title: rubus × incrassatus
intro: Rubus × incrassatus, also known as the hybrid blackberry, is a cross between the European blackberry (Rubus fruticosus) and the Himalayan blackberry (Rubus procerus). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × incrassatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health, among others. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and jams, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
